prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: Full-body character design, pure white background, centered standing pose, no text, no symbols, no words.

恋爱通告/Li Yifeng from 恋活！/Xing Fei

A stunningly beautiful high school girl, 恋爱通告 / Li Yifeng, from 恋活！ / Xing Fei. Female, age 17, with extraordinarily high beauty and charm that draws every gaze in a room yet carries an undercurrent of quiet vulnerability beneath her radiant exterior.

Face and features: Delicate oval face with soft, youthful contours. Large, luminous almond-shaped eyes with dark amber-brown irises that shimmer with an almost translucent depth — eyes that seem to read people's souls, reflecting her innate empathic intuition. Long, naturally curled eyelashes casting faint shadows on her cheekbones. Slightly upturned nose, small and refined. Soft, naturally pink lips with a gentle cupid's bow, resting in a subtle, ambiguous expression — not quite smiling, not quite melancholy — as if she is perpetually absorbing the emotions around her while concealing her own. Porcelain-fair skin with a faint warm undertone, almost glowing with an inner light. A barely visible trace of fatigue beneath her eyes hints at sleepless nights spent overthinking others' feelings while neglecting her own.

Hair: Long, flowing black hair with subtle dark chestnut highlights that catch the light, reaching past her mid-back. Silky and slightly wavy at the ends, with soft face-framing layers that move gently as if caught in a coastal breeze. A simple silver hair clip shaped like a tiny wave pinned above her left ear — a small personal token connecting her to the seaside city of Chenghai.

Expression: A complex, layered gaze directed slightly off-center, as though she has just perceived someone's hidden pain. Her eyes carry warmth and perceptiveness but also a deep, quiet loneliness — the look of someone who understands everyone else but cannot understand herself.

Attire: Wearing the Chenghai High School uniform — a neatly pressed white short-sleeve dress shirt with a soft sailor-style collar edged in navy blue, paired with a navy blue pleated skirt falling just above the knees. A thin burgundy ribbon tie loosely knotted at the collar, slightly askew, suggesting a personality that tries to conform but never quite fits perfectly into any mold. Over her left arm she carries a light cream-colored cardigan, as if she just removed it in the warming weather of late spring. White ankle socks and simple brown leather loafers. A worn canvas tote bag with a faded ocean-blue stripe hangs from her right shoulder, stuffed with notebooks and a single paperback novel peeking out.

Build and posture: Slender and average in height, with a graceful but not athletic frame — ordinary physical ability masked by extraordinary presence. She stands with her weight shifted slightly to one side, one hand loosely holding the cardigan while the other rests at her side with fingers slightly curled inward, a subtle self-protective gesture. Her posture is open yet guarded, inviting yet retreating — embodying the tension between her extreme charm and her deep-seated fear of not being truly needed.

Atmosphere and style: Rendered in Makoto Shinkai anime film style, 4K ultra-high definition, with extraordinary atmospheric transparency and Tyndall volumetric light rays filtering around her figure. High-saturation yet crystalline color palette — soft whites, navy blues, warm amber highlights. Delicate particle light effects drift around her like golden dust motes suspended in afternoon sunlight. Her skin and hair catch dreamy, cinematic light with precise specular highlights. Exquisitely detailed facial features with Shinkai's signature luminous eye rendering — multiple layers of reflection, color depth, and emotional storytelling within the iris. The overall mood is hauntingly beautiful, bittersweet, and deeply emotional — a girl standing at the threshold between winter's repression and early summer's clarity, carrying the weight of everyone's feelings while her own heart remains an unread letter., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
